seoTitle: Cringila vs Croki — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cringila and Croki. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cringila and Croki.
heading: Cringila vs Croki — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cringila, New South Wales and Croki, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cringila has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Croki (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cringila or Croki safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cringila has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Croki scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cringila scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Croki scores 64/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cringila or Croki?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cringila has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
